post_t12_state.detectRegime_role: live fallback / secondary — provides live regime for existing MarketSummary fields

reusable_parts: detectRegime() — retained as live diagnostic fallback
buildMarketSummary() — extended with optional persistedCtx parameter
generateDailyReport() async Promise.all — getLatestMarketRegimeContext added in parallel
MarketSummary interface — extended with optional regimeContext field
unsafe_parts: None — all changes are additive optional fields

audit_questions.Q1_rationale: detectRegime() is retained as live diagnostic and existing regime/regimeConfidence source for backward compatibility
audit_questions.Q2_rationale: When persisted context isAvailable=false, regimeContext.source='UNAVAILABLE', fallbackUsed=true
audit_questions.Q3_rationale: marketSummary.regimeContext uses PERSISTED_MARKET_REGIME_RESULT as primary source
audit_questions.Q4_stale_missing_handling: regimeContext.source='UNAVAILABLE' for missing; stale shows warning in regimeContext.warning and freshnessAlert
audit_questions.Q5_rationale: Added optional regimeContext? field to MarketSummary — backward compatible
audit_questions.Q6_rationale: No DB schema changes required — reads from existing MarketRegimeResult table
